name: cd00r
description: [cd00r](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1204) is an open-source backdoor for UNIX and UNIX-variant operating systems that was orginally released in 2000. [cd00r](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1204) source code is primarily based on a packet-capturing program as it utilizes a sniffer to listen for specific sequences of network traffic or "secret knock" before executing the attacker's code.(
